# Determining if 22493 is Prime

## Initial Checks

**Is it even?** No (ends in 3)
**Divisible by 3?** 2+2+4+9+3 = 20, not divisible by 3
**Divisible by 5?** No (doesn't end in 0 or 5)
**Divisible by 7?** 22493 ÷ 7 = 3213.28... No
**Divisible by 11?** 2-2+4-9+3 = -2, not divisible by 11
**Divisible by 13?** 22493 ÷ 13 = 1730.23... No
**Divisible by 17?** 22493 ÷ 17 = 1323.1... No
**Divisible by 19?** 22493 ÷ 19 = 1183.8... No
**Divisible by 23?** 22493 ÷ 23 = 977.9... No
**Divisible by 29?** 22493 ÷ 29 = 775.6... No
**Divisible by 31?** 22493 ÷ 31 = 725.6... No
**Divisible by 37?** 22493 ÷ 37 = 607.9... No
**Divisible by 41?** 22493 ÷ 41 = 548.6... No
**Divisible by 43?** 22493 ÷ 43 = 523.1... No
**Divisible by 47?** 22493 ÷ 47 = 478.6... No
**Divisible by 53?** 22493 ÷ 53 = 424.4... No
**Divisible by 59?** 22493 ÷ 59 = 381.2... No
**Divisible by 61?** 22493 ÷ 61 = 368.7... No
**Divisible by 67?** 22493 ÷ 67 = 335.7... No
**Divisible by 71?** 22493 ÷ 71 = 316.8... No
**Divisible by 73?** 22493 ÷ 73 = 308.1... No
**Divisible by 79?** 22493 ÷ 79 = 284.7... No
**Divisible by 83?** 22493 ÷ 83 = 271.0... → 83 × 271 = **22493** ✓

## Verification
83 × 271 = 83 × 270 + 83 = 22,410 + 83 = **22,493** ✓

## Conclusion

**22,493 is NOT prime.** It equals **83 × 271**.
